judge_reason: Description A describes a full typed document page with letterhead, signatures, and a 'RESTRICTED' stamp, while Description B describes only a coat of arms, indicating the descriptions are about fundamentally different visual content.
original_image_tags: Black-and-white photograph of a typed official document on "NEWFOUNDLAND CONSTABULARY" letterhead. The letterhead features a central crest/emblem with a cross. The document is dated July 13th, 1947. A large "RESTRICTED" stamp is visible at the bottom center. There are handwritten signatures and initials. The bottom corners have handwritten page numbers.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned typewritten police report page titled “NEWFOUNDLAND CONSTABULARY,” with handwritten annotations and signatures, a crest at the top, and a large “RESTRICTED” stamp near the bottom.*
